title: ShaderUniform
description: Metadata and current value for a single GLSL uniform variable. Populated by the backend during Shader.connect. The `dirty` flag is set to `true` on construction and on every setValue call; the backend clears it via markClean after uploading the value to the GPU. Array-type uniform names have their index suffix stripped (e.g. `uColors[0]` becomes `uColors`).

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: Metadata and current value for a single GLSL uniform variable.

Populated by the backend during Shader.connect. The `dirty` flag is set to `true` on construction and on every setValue call; the backend clears it via markClean after uploading the value to the GPU. Array-type uniform names have their index suffix stripped (e.g. `uColors[0]` becomes `uColors`).

members.name: new
members.signature: new(index: number, type: number, size: number, name: string, data: TypedArray): ShaderUniform

members.name: setValue
members.description: Copy value into the internal typed-array buffer and mark the uniform dirty. The backend will upload the new value to the GPU on the next Shader.sync call.

members.name: index
members.description: Zero-based index of this uniform within the shader program.

members.name: name
members.description: GLSL uniform name with array suffixes stripped.

members.name: size
members.description: Number of elements for array uniforms; 1 for scalar uniforms.

members.name: dirty
members.description: Whether the value has changed since the last markClean call.

members.name: propName
members.description: The leaf segment of a dot-separated uniform name. For top-level uniforms this equals name; for struct members (e.g. uLight.color) it returns only the field name (color).
